options.name: abstract-unix-socket
options.description: Connect via abstract Unix domain socket

options.name: alt-svc
options.description: Enable alt-svc with this cache file

options.name: append
options.description: Append to target file when uploading

options.name: ca-native
options.description: Load CA certs from the OS

options.name: cacert
options.description: CA certificate to verify peer against

options.name: capath
options.description: CA directory to verify peer against

options.name: connect-to
options.description: Connect to host2 instead of host1

options.name: cookie
options.description: Send cookies from string/load from file

options.name: cookie-jar
options.description: Save cookies to filename after operation

options.name: crlf
options.description: Convert LF to CRLF in upload

options.name: curves
options.description: (EC) TLS key exchange algorithms to request

options.name: dns-interface
options.description: Interface to use for DNS requests

options.name: dns-ipv4-addr
options.description: IPv4 address to use for DNS requests

options.name: dns-ipv6-addr
options.description: IPv6 address to use for DNS requests

options.name: doh-cert-status
options.description: Verify DoH server cert status OCSP-staple

options.name: dump-ca-embed
options.description: Write the embedded CA bundle to standard output

options.name: dump-header
options.description: Write the received headers to filename

options.name: egd-file
options.description: EGD socket path for random data

options.name: etag-save
options.description: Parse incoming ETag and save to a file

options.name: fail
options.description: Fail fast with no output on HTTP errors

options.name: fail-with-body
options.description: Fail on HTTP errors but save the body

options.name: ftp-create-dirs
options.description: Create the remote dirs if not present

options.name: ftp-skip-pasv-ip
options.description: Skip the IP address for PASV

options.name: ftp-ssl-control
options.description: Require TLS for login, clear for transfer

options.name: get
options.description: Put the post data in the URL and use GET

options.name: haproxy-protocol
options.description: Send HAProxy PROXY protocol v1 header

options.name: hostpubmd5
options.description: Acceptable MD5 hash of host public key

options.name: hostpubsha256
options.description: Acceptable SHA256 hash of host public key

options.name: hsts
options.description: Enable HSTS with this cache file

options.name: ignore-content-length
options.description: Ignore the size of the remote resource

options.name: ip-tos
options.description: Set IP Type of Service or Traffic Class

options.name: junk-session-cookies
options.description: Ignore session cookies read from file

options.name: libcurl
options.description: Generate libcurl code for this command line

options.name: local-port
options.description: Use a local port number within RANGE

options.name: location-trusted
options.description: As --location, but send secrets to other hosts

options.name: mail-auth
options.description: Originator address of the original email

options.name: mail-rcpt-allowfails
options.description: Allow RCPT TO command to fail

options.name: metalink
options.description: Process given URLs as metalink XML file

options.name: netrc
options.description: Must read .netrc for username and password

options.name: next
options.description: Make next URL use separate options

options.name: no-buffer
options.description: Disable buffering of the output stream

options.name: no-clobber
options.description: Do not overwrite files that already exist

options.name: no-keepalive
options.description: Disable TCP keepalive on the connection

options.name: no-progress-meter
options.description: Do not show the progress meter

options.name: noproxy
options.description: List of hosts which do not use proxy

options.name: out-null
options.description: Discard response data into the void

options.name: output
options.description: Write to file instead of stdout

options.name: parallel-max-host
options.description: Maximum connections to a single host

options.name: path-as-is
options.description: Do not squash .. sequences in URL path

options.name: pinnedpubkey
options.description: Public key to verify peer against

options.name: post301
options.description: Do not switch to GET after a 301 redirect

options.name: post302
options.description: Do not switch to GET after a 302 redirect

options.name: post303
options.description: Do not switch to GET after a 303 redirect

options.name: progress-bar
options.description: Display transfer progress as a bar

options.name: proto-default
options.description: Use PROTOCOL for any URL missing a scheme

options.name: proxy-basic
options.description: Use Basic authentication on the proxy

options.name: proxy-ca-native
options.description: Load CA certs from the OS to verify proxy

options.name: proxy-cacert
options.description: CA certificates to verify proxy against

options.name: proxy-capath
options.description: CA directory to verify proxy against

options.name: proxy-cert-type
options.description: Client certificate type for HTTPS proxy

options.name: proxy-ciphers
options.description: TLS 1.2 (1.1, 1.0) ciphers to use for proxy

options.name: proxy-crlfile
options.description: Set a CRL list for proxy

options.name: proxy-key-type
options.description: Private key file type for proxy

options.name: proxy-negotiate
options.description: HTTP Negotiate (SPNEGO) auth with the proxy

options.name: proxy-pass
options.description: Passphrase for private key for HTTPS proxy

options.name: proxy-pinnedpubkey
options.description: FILE/HASHES public key to verify proxy with

options.name: proxy-ssl-allow-beast
options.description: Allow this security flaw for HTTPS proxy

options.name: proxy-tlsauthtype
options.description: TLS authentication type for HTTPS proxy

options.name: proxy1.0
options.description: Use HTTP/1.0 proxy on given port

options.name: quote
options.description: Send command(s) to server before transfer

options.name: random-file
options.description: File for reading random data from

options.name: range
options.description: Retrieve only the bytes within RANGE

options.name: raw
options.description: Do HTTP raw; no transfer decoding

options.name: remote-name
options.description: Write output to file named as remote file

options.name: remote-name-all
options.description: Use the remote filename for all URLs

options.name: remote-time
options.description: Set remote file's time on local output

options.name: request-target
options.description: Specify the target for this request

options.name: retry
options.description: Retry request if transient problems occur

options.name: show-error
options.description: Show error even when -s is used

options.name: skip-existing
options.description: Skip download if local file already exists

options.name: socks4
options.description: SOCKS4 proxy on given host + port

options.name: socks4a
options.description: SOCKS4a proxy on given host + port

options.name: socks5
options.description: SOCKS5 proxy on given host + port

options.name: socks5-gssapi
options.description: Enable GSS-API auth for SOCKS5 proxies

options.name: socks5-gssapi-service
options.description: SOCKS5 proxy service name for GSS-API

options.name: socks5-hostname
options.description: SOCKS5 proxy, pass hostname to proxy

options.name: ssl-allow-beast
options.description: Allow security flaw to improve interop

options.name: ssl-revoke-best-effort
options.description: Ignore missing cert CRL dist points

options.name: ssl-sessions
options.description: Load/save SSL session tickets from/to this file

options.name: styled-output
options.description: Enable styled output for HTTP headers

options.name: tftp-no-options
options.description: Do not send any TFTP options

options.name: time-cond
options.description: Transfer based on a time condition

options.name: tls-earlydata
options.description: Allow use of TLSv1.3 early data (0RTT)

options.name: trace
options.description: Write a debug trace to FILE

options.name: trace-config
options.description: Details to log in trace/verbose output

options.name: trace-ids
options.description: Transfer + connection ids in verbose output

options.name: trace-time
options.description: Add time stamps to trace/verbose output

options.name: unix-socket
options.description: Connect through this Unix domain socket

options.name: xattr
options.description: Store metadata in extended file attributes

positionals.name: url
positionals.description: URL(s) to transfer data from or to
